mapper.sql: id, user_id, disease_code, board_sub, board_type, title, content, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, view_count, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_topic WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM community_topic WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE community_topic
disease_code = #{diseaseCode},
board_sub = #{boardSub},
board_type = #{boardType},
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE community_topic SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE community_topic SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND comment_count > 0
UPDATE community_topic SET collect_count = collect_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND collect_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_topic WHERE board_type = #{boardType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM community_topic WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND board_sub = #{boardSub}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR board_sub LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY (like_count * 5 + collect_count * 4 + comment_count * 3 + view_count) DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT FROM community_topic WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND board_sub = #{boardSub}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR board_sub LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR disease_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
